title: Baby Furniture Donation Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Baby Furniture Donation Programs 3 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LIVING WATER FELLOWSHIP EMBRACE GRACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a faith based support group that focuses on goal setting and planning. Participants can attend the annual infant and children's clothing swap and baby shower. Offers information on additional community resources. Accepts gently used maternity clothing and baby furniture and clothing. 1000 N Main Avenue Suite 12 Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Single and pregnant women Hours: Monday 6pm and Tuesday 5pm Email (971) 420-6801 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF BENTON COUNTY GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides children's clothing, personal hygiene items, linens (bedding, towels, etc.), baby bundles (newborn baby supplies and clothing), kitchen supplies, and a gift closet (for when community members can't afford to purchase gifts for special occasions). 4900 NW Hwy 99 Suite 102 Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Low-income community members in need Hours: Helpline: Monday-Thursday 9:30am-1:30pm Email (541) 757-8111 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY GAP RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides furniture, kitchen items, firewood, medical equipment, personal hygiene supplies, cleaning supplies, and bedding/linens. Accepts donations of similar items. Assistance depends on availability. Follow-ups may be provided once the need is met. Eligibility: Low-income households (self-declared or referred and verified by caseworker, employer, or landlord) Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 650-0153 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIVING WATER FELLOWSHIP EMBRACE GRACE LOVE INC OF BENTON COUNTY GAP MINISTRIES
